final:
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [2:0] op_code,  
    output reg [63:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (op_code)  
            3'b000: result = A + B;        // Addition  
            3'b001: result = A - B;        // Subtraction  
            3'b010: result = A & B;        // Bitwise AND  
            3'b011: result = A | B;        // Bitwise OR  
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;        // Bitwise XOR  
            default: result = 64'b0;       // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result = ~A; // Invert A
      result = ~B; // Invert B
      result = ~(A + B); // Invert addition result
      result = ~(A - B); // Invert subtraction result
      result = ~(A & B); // Invert AND result
      result = ~(A | B); // Invert OR result
      result = ~(A ^ B); // Invert XOR result
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
result = ~A; // Invert A
result = ~B; // Invert B
result = ~(A + B); // Invert addition result
result = ~(A - B); // Invert subtraction result
result = ~(A & B); // Invert AND result
result = ~(A | B); // Invert OR result
result = ~(A ^ B); // Invert XOR result
